title: delphinium hirticaule var. coelestinum
intro: Delphinium hirticaule var. coelestinum, commonly known as mountain delphinium, is a type of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. This plant contains delphinine, a toxic compound with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Delphinium hirticaule var. coelestinum are said to have antispasmodic, diuretic, and sedative effects, offering potential health benefits in treating conditions such as insomnia, anxiety, and urinary problems. Delphinium hirticaule var. coelestinum is typically prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, with caution advised due to its toxicity and potential side effects.
